fields.name: Closed Opportunities
fields.tooltip: Specifies opportunities that have been closed.

fields.name: Opportunities Due in 7 Days
fields.tooltip: Specifies opportunities with a due date in seven days or more.

fields.name: Overdue Opportunities
fields.tooltip: Specifies opportunities that have exceeded the due date.

fields.name: Contacts - Companies
fields.tooltip: Specifies contacts assigned to a company.

fields.name: Open Sales Quotes
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of sales quotes that are not yet converted to invoices or orders.

fields.name: Open Sales Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of sales orders that are not fully posted.

fields.name: Active Campaigns
fields.tooltip: Specifies marketing campaigns that are active.

fields.name: Coupled Data Synch Errors
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of errors that occurred in the latest synchronization of coupled data between Business Central and Dynamics 365 Sales.

fields.name: CDS Integration Errors
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of errors related to data integration.
